ksa_text: Ability to establish and oversee human oversight mechanisms and transparency governance requirements for AI systems to ensure human control and explainability.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — included on balance: ability carries governance/compliance signals ("oversight   :function|mechan|structure|require|rol", "explainabilit  :y") in Data Governance context (affinity 0.58). Composite minimal (0.0000). A AI System Impact Assessment Coordinator would encounter this competency in regulatory program work.
